title: Moderation Update — 2026-04-29
body:
Abuse queue triage complete. 6 reports reviewed.

Actions taken:
- spam_wave_42: Banned (phishing links across 6 channels)
- toxic_runner: Banned (repeated targeted harassment against newcomers)
- bot_like_user_77: Warned (suspicious automation, near-identical replies)
- new_member_17: Warned (off-topic post in #introductions)

Dismissed:
- trusted_helper: Report closed — trusted member, dispute context only
- core_maintainer: Report closed — false positive from brigading after moderation decision

No trusted members were sanctioned.
